hero.name: Eduardo Miguel
hero.description: Software Engineer focused on Backend architecture development and Artificial Intelligence solutions. Experience integrating language models (LLMs) through agents for SQL queries using LangGraph and AWS Bedrock. Specialist in building scalable services on AWS (Lambdas, S3) and creating technical dashboards, efficiently connecting server logic with web and mobile applications.

asobanca.title: ASOBANCA Platform
asobanca.description: Comprehensive system for financial institutions with client management, transaction processing and regulatory reporting modules.
asobanca.longDescription: Complete web platform developed with Laravel and Vue.js that allows financial institutions to manage clients, process transactions and generate regulatory reports with interactive dashboards.

munsterMind.title: Münster Mind App
munsterMind.description: Strategic HR solution helping companies understand people, align strengths with culture, and create thriving work environments.
munsterMind.longDescription: Mobile app that goes beyond traditional HR processes by analyzing meaningful data about candidates and teams, empowering better hiring decisions and reducing turnover through strategic people insights.

conafis.title: CONAFIS SARAS System
conafis.description: Government platform for resource management and statistical analysis with high availability and security.
conafis.longDescription: Government web system developed with Angular and NestJS for efficient management of public resources with statistical analysis modules, high availability and maximum security.

sinapsekEducation.title: Sinapsek Education
sinapsekEducation.description: Educational platform focused on professional growth in technological and mathematical areas, designed for university preparation.
sinapsekEducation.longDescription: Comprehensive educational platform developed with Django and React that offers specialized courses in technology and mathematics. Features include personalized learning paths, progress tracking, and preparation modules for university entrance exams.

billusos.title: billusos
billusos.description: Electronic invoicing and business management platform with integration to government services.
billusos.longDescription: Business system developed with Django and React for electronic invoicing, client management and complete integration with SRI and other government agencies.

fullstack-lateral.title: AI Engineer | Backend
fullstack-lateral.subtitle: Münster Mind Latinoamérica
tasks: Architected and built the first production version of a graph-based Text-to-SQL AI agent using LangGraph and AWS Bedrock, integrated with a FastAPI backend, automating a large share of previously manual SQL query creation.

Developed serverless backend services on AWS Lambda that orchestrate LLM provider APIs (AWS Bedrock, OpenAI, Gemini) and expose them through REST APIs consumed by the web (Angular) and mobile (Flutter) applications.
Built and maintained serverless backend services with AWS Lambda and Step Functions using NestJS and Prisma ORM, serving both the mobile application and the web platform.
Developed and shipped a cross-platform mobile application with Flutter for Android and iOS, managing the full release cycle on Google Play Store and Apple App Store.
Deployed cloud infrastructure with Terraform (Lambda, S3, Step Functions) and implemented CI/CD pipelines with monitoring on Amazon CloudWatch and Google Cloud Platform.

billusos-dev.title: Backend Developer
billusos-dev.subtitle: Billusos
tasks: Developed and optimized backend services in Python and Django for automated generation of financial reports and operational dashboards, eliminating manual processes.
Built and maintained mobile application features with React Native, ensuring seamless integration with REST API endpoints and server-side business logic.
Managed the data persistence layer and optimized complex PostgreSQL queries for business intelligence reporting, improving dashboard response times.

junior-fullstack.title: Software Engineer
junior-fullstack.subtitle: Centro Ecuatoriano de Eficiencia de Recursos (CEER)
tasks: Developed dynamic reports and interactive dashboards through optimized PostgreSQL database queries for the CONAFIPS SARAS platform
Implemented features in both Backend (Laravel/Lumen) and Frontend (Angular), ensuring correct visualization of key metrics
Participated in data flow integration for financial business logic compliance
